title: Upcomers 75% OFF
description: Upcomers is a rapidly growing prop firm authorized to provide elite trading capital. They offer up to $2,500,000 in scaling and an industry-leading 99% profit split. Verified by our [Intelligence Hub](/) for prop trading excellence.
seo_content:
Upcomers 75% OFF Technical Overview

Upcomers is offering a verified 75% discount on all challenge accounts using code BOGO75. This promotion provides access to one of the most ambitious proprietary trading firms in the current market — a firm that caps trader allocation at an extraordinary $2,500,000 and offers a class-leading 99% profit split. For highly profitable traders, the combination of extreme capital capacity and maximum profit retention makes Upcomers the highest-earning environment in the prop trading industry at this discount level.

Upcomers was founded in January 2023 and has grown rapidly into a recognized prop trading firm authorized to provide elite trading capital. The firm is built around the philosophy that the most skilled traders deserve both the highest capital allocation and the greatest share of their profits. With a verified trust score of 4.5 and a growing funded trader community, Upcomers has established credibility in a competitive market by delivering on its exceptional terms consistently since launch.

With code BOGO75, the challenge fee across all Upcomers tiers — up to the flagship $2.5M account — is reduced by 75%. Once funded, the 99% profit split is applied from the first payout, meaning Upcomers retains only 1% of your trading profits. This is the highest profit retention rate available to funded traders across any major prop firm globally. The $2.5M scaling cap is accessed through a two-step challenge evaluation, with scaling milestones triggered by consistent funded account performance.

Upcomers supports three professional trading platforms: MT5, cTrader, and DXTrade — giving traders maximum flexibility in platform choice. Instruments available include forex, metals, indices, energy, and crypto. The firm allows copy trading and expert advisors (EAs), though arbitrage and HFT strategies are prohibited. Minimum payout is $50, with processing times from instant to 14 days depending on the withdrawal method (Bank Transfer or Crypto). The challenge structure is a standard two-step evaluation with defined profit targets and drawdown rules.

To claim this deal, visit Upcomers via the affiliate link above, select your preferred challenge size (including the $2.5M tier), and enter BOGO75 at checkout. The 75% discount will apply immediately to your order. Review the consistency rules and forbidden strategy list on the Upcomers site before purchasing to ensure your trading style is compatible with their funded account terms. Payouts begin after your minimum balance threshold of $50 is reached in your funded account.
